mapper.select: select m.schedule_no, m.schedule_title, m.schedule_status, to_char(m.schedule_startdate, 'yyyy.mm.dd') as scheduleStartdate, to_char(m.schedule_enddate, 'yyyy.mm.dd') as scheduleEnddate, m.schedule_visibility, m.member_no, (select count(*) from schedule_sub s where s.schedule_no = m.schedule_no) as placeCount, (select listagg(l.mapx || ',' || l.mapy, ';') within group (order by s.schedule_sub_date, s.schedule_sub_seq) from schedule_sub s join landmark l on l.content_id = s.content_id where s.schedule_no = m.schedule_no and l.mapx is not null and l.mapy is not null ) as coords from schedule_main m where m.member_no = #{member_no} order by m.create_date desc
